The analysis uses spectral effective-rank entropy, a rank-like summary of the singular-value distributions of critic weight matrices, to assess critic model complexity. Across TD3 and PPO experiments, critic complexity is tracked together with return and Monte Carlo value-estimation bias. The results show that critic complexity is measurable throughout training and is systematically associated with training behavior, while also making clear that the relationship is heterogeneous across algorithms, tasks, and hyperparameters. A direct complexity-control intervention is then evaluated by adding a spectral-entropy penalty to the critic loss. This intervention reliably changes the targeted spectral quantity, demonstrating that critic complexity can be controlled rather than only observed. Return effects are treated as task-dependent evidence rather than as a general performance claim, because overall complexity-control results vary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过谱有效秩熵（spectral effective-rank entropy）来评估和调控演员-评论家强化学习方法中评论家网络复杂度的新方法，并在TD3和PPO实验中验证了其可测量性、与训练行为的关联性，以及通过谱熵惩罚实现复杂度控制的可能性。
AI.motivation: 演员-评论家方法依赖学习得到的评论家，但评论家质量通常仅通过回报、时序差分误差或价值损失间接评估，缺乏直接诊断评论家复杂度的工具。
AI.method: 使用谱有效秩熵（基于评论家权重矩阵奇异值分布的秩-like统计量）评估评论家模型复杂度；并在评论家损失中加入谱熵惩罚项以实现复杂度直接控制。
AI.result: 评论家复杂度在整个训练过程中可测量，且与训练行为系统相关；但该关系在算法、任务和超参数间呈现异质性。谱熵惩罚能可靠地改变目标谱量，证明复杂度可被控制。
AI.conclusion: 评论家复杂度可作为演员-评论家强化学习的一个额外诊断和干预维度，但其对回报的影响需根据具体任务证据判断，而非通用性能声明。

title: Theoria: Rewrite-Acceptability Verification over Informal Reasoning States
summary: When should an AI system's answer be trusted? Formal proof assistants offer certainty but cannot reach most of the problem distribution; scalar LLM judges offer coverage but produce opaque scores that cannot be audited after the fact and are subject to the same coherence issues as any LLM. We present Theoria, a verification architecture that closes this gap. A candidate solution is rewritten into a sequence of typed state transitions, each licensed by an explicit justification, whether that be a citation, computation, or problem-given fact, and every transition is independently auditable. The foundational invariant is completeness of change: every difference between consecutive proof states must be accounted for, so hidden premises surface as unlicensed mutations rather than passing silently. On HLE-Verified Gold (185 text-only expert problems), Theoria certifies 105 at 91.4% strict precision (Wilson 95% CI [84.5%, 95.4%]). Every certification produces a human readable proof trace in which each step can be independently challenged. Holistic LLM judges achieve comparable precision at matched coverage but fail on different problems (Jaccard 0.14-0.36), making the approaches complementary. On 95 adversarial poisoned proofs across 15 domains, structured judges catch 94.7% versus 83.2% for holistic judging (p= 0.0017). The overall 11.5 pp gap concentrates in hidden premises (90.6% vs. 62.5%, a 28 pp difference) and fabricated citations (100% vs. 90%), the error classes where the formal analysis predicts an advantage; performance is identical on arithmetic and theorem-misapplication errors, where no advantage is predicted. On GPQA Diamond (n= 65), certified precision is 97.1% (Wilson CI [85.1%, 99.5%]).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Theoria验证架构，将AI候选答案重写为可独立审计的状态转换序列，通过“变更完整性”确保每一步都有显式理由。在HLE-Verified Gold上以91.4%严格精度认证105个问题，并发现与整体LLM评判互补（Jaccard 0.14-0.36）；在对抗性毒化证明中，结构化评判比整体评判高出11.5个百分点，主要优势体现在隐藏前提和伪造引用上。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在可信度验证上存在两难：形式化证明覆盖范围有限，而标量LLM评判评分不透明且无法事后审计。作者希望填补这一差距，构建可审计、可验证的推理信任架构。
AI.method: Theoria架构将候选答案重写为类型化状态转换序列，每一步都需要明确理由（引用、计算或问题给定事实），并确保相邻证明状态之间的每个差异都必须有解释（变更完整性）。通过严格的形式化审计实现可验证性。
AI.result: HLE-Verified Gold上认证105题，严格精度91.4%；对抗性毒化证明捕获率94.7%（vs 整体评判83.2%）；隐藏前提检测90.6%（vs 62.5%）；伪造引用检测100%（vs 90%）；GPQA Diamond上认证精度97.1%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化验证架构在可审计性和对抗性鲁棒性上优于整体LLM评判，尤其擅长捕捉隐藏前提和伪造引用等关键错误类型，且与整体评判具有互补性。

title: DroneFINE: Domain-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Detectors for Drone Images
summary: Object detection for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) working in open and dynamic environments is a highly challenging task. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have offered a powerful solution for universal object detection, adapting them to UAV scenarios remains non-trivial due to a substantial domain gap between VLM pre-training data and aerial imagery. The prevailing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods prove ineffective in bridging this gap, as VLMs' "natural-scene, foreground-dominant" visual priors misalign with the "bird's-eye-view, background-dominant, small-object" characteristics of UAV data. To address this issue, we propose DroneFINE, a novel PEFT paradigm comprising two domain-aware complementary modules tailored for VLM-based drone image detectors. Specifically, a data-dependent, foreground-aware, and multi-path adaptation mechanism named HyperAdapter is designed, which overcomes the static structural constraints of PEFT. In addition, a background suppression algorithm named SemanticGate is developed. It is a text-conditioned guidance strategy that employs background vocabulary to actively guide the model in suppressing responses from irrelevant regions. Extensive experiments on VisDrone and UAVDT demonstrate that DroneFINE significantly outperforms existing PEFT methods and achieves performance comparable to full fine-tuning while substantially reducing the number of trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出DroneFINE，一种针对无人机场景下VLM检测的域感知PEFT方法，包含HyperAdapter（前景感知多路径适应）和SemanticGate（背景语义抑制），在无人机检测数据集上取得接近全微调的性能且参数量大幅减少。
AI.motivation: 无人机目标检测面临领域鸿沟：VLM预训练数据是"自然场景、前景主导"，而无人机图像是"鸟瞰视角、背景主导、小目标"。现有PEFT方法因静态结构约束无法有效弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出DroneFINE框架，包含两个域感知模块：1) HyperAdapter——数据依赖、前景感知的多路径适应机制，克服PEFT的静态结构约束；2) SemanticGate——基于文本条件的背景语义抑制算法，利用背景词汇主动引导模型抑制无关区域响应。
AI.result: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上，DroneFINE显著优于现有PEFT方法，达到与全微调可比的性能，同时大幅减少可训练参数量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的域感知PEFT范式DroneFINE有效弥合了VLM与无人机图像之间的领域鸿沟，为VLM在无人机场景的应用提供了高效解决方案。

title: What Survives Into Context: A Diagnostic for Budget-Constrained Multi-Hop RAG and When Submodular Evidence Packing Improves It
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) under a fixed reader-context budget forces a selection problem: of the evidence retrieved, only a fraction can be shown to the reader. We argue that document recall -- the standard retrieval metric -- is the wrong quantity to optimize in this regime, and we make two contributions. First, as a general contribution, we introduce answer-in-context, a diagnostic that measures whether a gold answer survives as a contiguous span in the packed reader context (not the retrieved set). It predicts answer F1 better than recall (r=0.39-0.55 vs. about 0.31), separates answer quality roughly five-fold (0.60 vs. 0.12 on HotpotQA), and carries information beyond retrieval: it adds Delta R squared=0.17 over recall and shows a 4.6x EM gap even among questions where all gold was retrieved. We also confirm it interventionally: on 2WikiMultiHopQA a packing change that raises coverage but not answer-in-context yields no accuracy gain. Second, as a conditional contribution, we cast reader-context construction as budgeted monotone submodular maximization and build a packer that jointly optimizes relevance, query coverage, representativeness, and diversity. On HotpotQA with a 160-token budget and a 3B reader it beats a strong focused heuristic, MMR, and naive packing -- by up to +5.1 F1 at equal-or-lower token cost, across three seeds. Crucially, we map the scope of this win honestly: it requires the conjunction of (i) multi-hop complementary structure, (ii) retrieval that surfaces the evidence, (iii) a binding but not extreme budget, and (iv) a reader weak enough that evidence density, not reading capacity, is the bottleneck. A quantization-controlled reader-scale ladder (3B to 7B to 14B) shows the edge over the heuristic is absorbed by 7B and significantly reverses by 14B, while the diagnostic explains every boundary with a single variable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的RAG评估指标"answer-in-context"，并基于带预算的子模最大化优化阅读器上下文构建，实验表明该方法在特定条件下有效，但优势随模型规模增大而消失。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在固定阅读器上下文预算下，传统的检索召回率无法准确预测下游答案质量，需要更好的评估指标和上下文构建方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出answer-in-context诊断指标，衡量黄金答案在打包后的阅读器上下文中是否以连续片段形式存在。2) 将阅读器上下文构建建模为带预算的单调子模最大化问题，联合优化相关性、查询覆盖、代表性和多样性。
AI.result: Answer-in-context比召回率更好地预测F1（r=0.39-0.55 vs 0.31），在HotpotQA上答案质量差距约5倍（0.60 vs 0.12）。打包方法在160 token预算下比MMR和朴素打包提升最多+5.1 F1。但优势在7B被吸收，14B时反转。
AI.conclusion: Answer-in-context是比召回率更好的RAG评估指标；所提打包方法仅在多跳互补结构、检索充分、预算紧约束且阅读器能力有限的条件下有效，随阅读器规模增大优势消失。

title: MolSafeEval: A Benchmark for Uncovering Safety Risks in AI-Generated Molecules
summary: Current molecular generation benchmarks emphasize task complexity, molecule novelty, and property alignment; they largely overlook a critical concern: the potential safety risks of AI-generated molecules. In practice, many generative models may produce molecules with toxic, reactive, or otherwise hazardous characteristics - posing hidden dangers that remain insufficiently addressed. To address this gap, we introduce MolSafeEval, a benchmark dedicated to evaluating and analyzing the safety risks of molecular generation. Unlike prior approaches that rely on narrow toxicity predictors, MolSafeEval integrates heterogeneous safety knowledge - ranging from toxicological databases to hazard rules - into a structured molecular safety knowledge graph. This graph serves as a foundation for large language model-based reasoning, enabling systematic detection and explanation of unsafe features in generated compounds. We further categorize molecular generative models into four representative task types - unconditional generation, property optimization, target protein-based design, and text-based generation - and provide standardized datasets and safety evaluation protocols for each. By systematically revealing the safety vulnerabilities of current generative approaches, MolSafeEval offers a new lens for benchmarking molecular models and provides essential guidance toward safer, more trustworthy molecular design.

AI.tldr: MolSafeEval是一个专门评估AI生成分子安全风险的基准，通过整合毒理学数据库和危险规则构建分子安全知识图谱，结合LLM推理识别不安全特征，覆盖四类分子生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成基准忽视AI生成分子的安全风险（毒性、反应性等），缺乏系统评估工具。
AI.method: 构建分子安全知识图谱（整合毒理学数据库与危险规则），基于LLM推理检测不安全特征；划分四类生成任务（无条件生成、性质优化、靶点设计、文本生成）并标准化评估协议。
AI.result: 系统揭示了当前生成模型的安全脆弱性，提供了新的安全评估视角。
AI.conclusion: MolSafeEval为更安全、更可信的分子设计提供了重要指导，填补了分子生成安全评估的空白。

title: Personalized Object Identification and Localization via In-Context Inference with Vision-Language Models
summary: Personalized object localization (POL) localizes an object instance in a query image based on a few reference images with bounding-box annotations and a target object label. The pioneering method, IPLoc, solves this task through in-context inference with vision-language models (VLMs). However, it assumes that the query image always contains the target object. This assumption severely limits its applicability to real-world scenarios with many irrelevant images. To address this issue, we formulate a new task, personalized object identification and localization (POIL), by positioning POL within the broader few-shot object detection framework. POIL aims to localize the target object instance while rejecting query images that do not contain the reference object instance. We also present POIL datasets constructed from public sources. We further propose an in-context algorithm named IPLoc-ID for solving POIL with VLMs. IPLoc-ID first predicts a candidate bounding box and then determines whether it corresponds to the reference object instance. We introduce a self-posed query to connect these two steps within a single autoregressive generation framework. Through ablation studies and comprehensive experiments, we show that IPLoc-ID substantially suppresses false-positive detections on negative query images while maintaining localization performance comparable to IPLoc. Overall, IPLoc-ID effectively addresses the practical instance-level POIL task, which cannot be sufficiently solved by conventional object detection, few-shot object detection, or the localization-only IPLoc method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出POIL任务（个性化目标识别与定位），在POL基础上增加负样本拒绝能力，并设计IPLoc-ID方法，通过自提问机制连接候选框预测与目标验证，在抑制误检的同时保持定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有POL方法（如IPLoc）假设查询图像始终包含目标物体，这严重限制了其在真实场景中的应用。实际场景中大量查询图像并不包含目标物体，需要具备拒绝能力。
AI.method: 提出POIL任务框架，将POL置于更广泛的少样本目标检测中。设计IPLoc-ID算法，先预测候选边界框，再通过自提问机制（self-posed query）在统一自回归生成框架中判断该框是否对应目标物体。
AI.result: IPLoc-ID在负样本查询图像上显著抑制了误检，同时保持了与IPLoc相当的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: IPLoc-ID有效解决了实际场景中的实例级POIL任务，这是传统目标检测、少样本目标检测或仅定位的IPLoc方法无法充分解决的。

title: MetaHOPE: A Metaphor-Oriented Evaluation Framework for Analysing MT and LLM Translation Errors
summary: In this opinion paper, we propose MetaHOPE, an error severity-aware annotation framework for evaluating metaphor translations. Metaphors present challenges for machine translation (MT) and natural language understanding and processing (NLU, NLP), because it presents the features of semantic complexity, contextual dependency, and cultural embeddings that can lead to ambiguity issues for NLP models. To investigate how state-of-the-art NLP models perform on translating metaphors, we select three representative systems, i.e., GoogleMT, GPT5.4, and Hunyuan-7b as Neural MT (NMT) models and LLMs. We used two human-annotated metaphor corpora, including VUAMC and PSUCMC for English-to-Chinese and Chinese-to-English translation purposes. The original corpora we used are monolingual, where we carried out error annotation using the MetaHOPE framework, and also produced the human post-edited gold reference for bilingual use as a new resource. We believe the MetaHOPE evaluation framework for metaphor translation annotation, the parallel corpora resources, and the error analysis on SOTA automatic translation models can be useful and shed some light for the field of metaphor translation study. We share our resources publicly upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaHOPE框架，用于评估隐喻翻译中的错误严重程度，分析了GoogleMT、GPT5.4和Hunyuan-7b在英汉双向隐喻翻译上的表现。
AI.motivation: 隐喻翻译对机器翻译和NLP模型具有挑战性，现有评估缺乏对错误严重性的细粒度标注，因此需要设计一个感知错误严重性的标注框架。
AI.method: 提出MetaHOPE错误严重性感知的隐喻翻译标注框架，基于VUAMC和PSUMC两个单语语料库进行人工标注，并生成人工后编辑的黄金参考译文，用于评估GoogleMT、GPT5.4和Hunyuan-7b三种翻译模型。
AI.result: 构建了双语平行语料资源，对三个SOTA翻译模型进行了错误分析，揭示了隐喻翻译中的常见错误模式。
AI.conclusion: MetaHOPE框架、平行语料资源和错误分析结果对隐喻翻译研究具有重要参考价值，相关资源将在论文接收后公开。

title: How Early Is Early Enough? Design-Dependent Observation-Window Sufficiency in Subscription Churn Prediction
summary: How many days of early behavior suffice for subscription churn prediction? In the public KKBox dataset, the early indicator of churn is typically an indicator of someone's contract status; however, when looking in the heavily churned manual-renewal segment, having access to early behavior creates a substantial increase in prediction for that specific segment (PR +0.10 at 120 days). A nine-window sufficiency curve shows a diminishing-returns knee in a 45-90 day band. However, stress-testing over three cohort/task designs shows that this curve is singular to the design being tested; for example, in our test with a moving target, the curve inverts and can shift depending on the feature set used. Therefore, any window-sufficiency claim should state its cohort construction, target definition, and feature families. All evidence is from one music-streaming dataset; the mechanism should generalize but the magnitudes may not.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在KKBox数据集中，早期行为数据对订阅流失预测所需的足够天数，发现45-90天区间存在收益递减的拐点，但该曲线会随实验设计（如队列构建、目标定义、特征集）而变化。
AI.motivation: 探究在订阅流失预测任务中，需要多长时间的早期行为数据才能达到足够的预测效果。
AI.method: 使用KKBox公开数据集，对手动续费的高流失细分群体进行分析，采用九窗口充分性曲线进行实验，并对不同队列/任务设计进行压力测试。
AI.result: 120天时手动续费群体的PR提升+0.10；45-90天区间存在收益递减拐点；但该曲线会因队列构建、目标定义和特征集的不同而改变，在移动目标场景下曲线甚至会反转。
AI.conclusion: 任何窗口充分性声称都应明确说明其队列构建、目标定义和特征家族；该结果基于单一音乐流媒体数据集，机制可推广但具体数值可能不适用。

title: UltraFlux: Data-Model Co-Design for High-quality Native 4K Text-to-Image Generation across Diverse Aspect Ratios
summary: Diffusion transformers have recently delivered strong text-to-image generation around 1K resolution, but we show that extending them to native 4K across diverse aspect ratios exposes a tightly coupled failure mode spanning positional encoding, VAE compression, and optimization. Tackling any of these factors in isolation leaves substantial quality on the table. We therefore take a data-model co-design view and introduce UltraFlux, a Flux-based DiT trained natively at 4K on MultiAspect-4K-1M, a 1M-image 4K corpus with controlled multi-AR coverage, bilingual captions, and rich VLM/IQA metadata for resolution- and AR-aware sampling. On the model side, UltraFlux couples (i) Resonance 2D RoPE with YaRN for training-window-, frequency-, and AR-aware positional encoding at 4K; (ii) a simple, non-adversarial VAE post-training scheme that improves 4K reconstruction fidelity; (iii) an SNR-Aware Huber Wavelet objective that rebalances gradients across timesteps and frequency bands; and (iv) a Stage-wise Aesthetic Curriculum Learning strategy that concentrates high-aesthetic supervision on high-noise steps governed by the model prior. Together, these components yield a stable, detail-preserving 4K DiT that generalizes across wide, square, and tall ARs. On the Aesthetic-Eval at 4096 benchmark and multi-AR 4K settings, UltraFlux consistently outperforms strong open-source baselines across fidelity, aesthetic, and alignment metrics, and-with a LLM prompt refiner-matches or surpasses the proprietary Seedream 4.0.

AI.tldr: UltraFlux是一种基于Flux的扩散Transformer模型，通过数据-模型协同设计，原生支持4K分辨率下多种宽高比的文本到图像生成，在多项指标上超越开源和部分闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散Transformer在1K分辨率表现良好，但扩展到4K原生分辨率时，位置编码、VAE压缩和优化等多个因素会耦合失效，单独解决任何一个因素都无法取得满意效果。
AI.method: 提出数据-模型协同设计：构建MultiAspect-4K-1M数据集；模型侧引入Resonance 2D RoPE+YaRN位置编码、非对抗VAE后训练、SNR-Aware Huber Wavelet损失函数、Stage-wise Aesthetic Curriculum Learning。
AI.result: 在Aesthetic-Eval 4096基准和多宽高比4K设置下，UltraFlux在保真度、美学质量和图文对齐指标上持续优于强开源基线，结合LLM提示优化器可媲美或超越Seedream 4.0。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性解决高分辨率下的多因素耦合问题，实现了稳定、细节保留的4K DiT，且对多种宽高比具有良好泛化能力。

title: SFDATrack: Generalized Source-Free Domain Adaptive Tracking Under Adverse Weather Conditions
summary: Domain adaptive visual object tracking under adverse weather conditions has garnered significant attention in recent years. Despite the impressive performance, existing methods heavily rely on the large-scale video frames from both source and target domains, which is impractical under rigid resource constraints where source data is unavailable. To overcome this limitation, we propose SFDATrack, a generalized source-free domain adaptive tracker that merely leverages adverse weather samples from the target domain for robust state estimation. Specifically, SFDATrack first employs a mean-teacher backbone with Dual Interactive Mamba (DIM) blocks to distill the candidate target tokens that are resilient to weather variations from classified, augmented samples. Afterwards, we introduce a hyperspherical prototype projection (HPP) module to project these tokens onto multi-domain prototypes within a latent hyperspherical space. By enforcing both domain-specific and domain-invariant properties of the multi-domain prototypes, SFDATrack can be seamlessly adapted to diverse weather conditions with powerful generalizability. Extensive experiments evaluated on various benchmarks demonstrate that SFDATrack achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/watcherBR0/sfdatrack.

AI.tldr: 提出SFDA-Track，一种无需源数据的域自适应目标跟踪方法，通过Mamba架构和超球面原型投影应对恶劣天气下的跟踪挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有域自适应跟踪方法严重依赖源域和目标域的大规模视频帧，在资源受限且源数据不可用时难以实用。
AI.method: 1) 采用均值教师架构+双交互Mamba模块提取抗天气变化的候选目标token；2) 超球面原型投影模块将token投影到多域原型上，同时强制域特定和域不变属性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无源域自适应跟踪器可有效适应多种恶劣天气条件，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: The Course of News Events: A Comparison of Bottom-Up and Top-Down Approaches for Collecting Text-Based Data about Disasters
summary: News articles are an important source of information on disaster impacts and adaptation. A key methodological challenge in socio-environmental studies is how to select a representative data sample. Two approaches are common: querying news databases top-down with the aid of an existing disaster inventory or using NLP methods to cluster news texts bottom-up based on temporal and spatial features. Using a dataset of German news about landslides worldwide, we compare these approaches and discuss variations in event coverage. Such research design decision can influence the resulting news sample, affecting its use in studies of inequality in media coverage, disaster monitoring and inventory enrichment.

AI.tldr: 比较了两种从新闻中提取灾害信息的方法：基于灾害清单的顶向下查询 vs. 基于自然语言处理的底向上聚类，发现研究设计会影响样本代表性。
AI.motivation: 社会-环境研究中如何选择代表性新闻数据样本是一个关键方法论挑战，需要比较不同方法的优劣。
AI.method: 以德国关于全球滑坡的新闻数据集为例，对比了两种方法：1）利用现有灾害清单进行顶向下数据库查询；2）基于时间和空间特征的NLP底向上聚类。
AI.result: 两种方法在事件覆盖率上存在差异，研究设计决策会影响最终新闻样本的特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究设计的选择会影响新闻样本的代表性，进而影响其在媒体覆盖不平等、灾害监测和清单丰富化等研究中的应用。

title: Interpretable vs Learned Encoders for High-Cardinality Fraud Detection
summary: A total of seven categorical encoding methods were tested on the IEEE-CIS fraud benchmark dataset (590,540 records, 3.5% positives, 8 high-cardinality columns). The encoders were evaluated using a stratified 5-fold cross-validation (CV) with three repetitions. Five of the encoders had identical frozen LightGBM learners in the downstream phase, allowing for controlled comparisons of their performance to each other. CatBoost and TabNet were included as comparisons across paradigms using different learners. The entity embeddings produced the highest AUC-ROC (0.9612), with a statistically significant tie with that of CatBoost (0.9602) and statistically superior to tier group encoding (0.9548), whereas target encoding was only 0.0023 worse than tier group encoding and the auditor-friendly tier boundaries were maintained. Off-the-shelf TabNet did not outperform tree-based pipelines and collapsed under data scarcity. On AUC-PR, CatBoost leads (0.822 vs. 0.793); no encoder dominated both metrics. Per-column analysis confirmed the embedding advantage arises from joint multi-column representation.

AI.tldr: 本文在IEEE-CIS欺诈数据集上比较了7种分类编码方法，发现实体嵌入（AUC-ROC=0.9612）与CatBoost（0.9602）表现最佳且统计无显著差异，但各方法在不同评估指标上各有优劣。
AI.motivation: 探讨不同分类编码方法在高基数分类特征欺诈检测任务中的性能差异，尤其关注实体嵌入方法能否超越传统编码方案。
AI.method: 在IEEE-CIS欺诈基准数据集上测试7种分类编码方法，使用分层5折交叉验证（3次重复），固定LightGBM作为下游分类器进行控制变量比较，同时引入CatBoost和TabNet作为跨范式对比。
AI.result: 实体嵌入AUC-ROC最高（0.9612），与CatBoost（0.9602）统计持平，显著优于层级分组编码（0.9548）；AUC-PR上CatBoost领先（0.822 vs 0.793）；TabNet表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 实体嵌入的优越性源于联合多列表示学习，但不同编码方法在不同指标上各有优势，需根据具体任务需求选择。

title: MEPA: Multi-Scale Representation Alignment for Visual Autoregressive Modeling with Mixture of Experts
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 8 tables, Accepted at ECCV 2026
summary: Visual AutoRegressive modeling (VAR) has pioneered a coarse-to-fine multi-scale autoregressive generative paradigm, demonstrating strong capabilities in image generation. However, VAR still suffers from inherent deficiencies in multi-scale representation learning. Specifically, lower scales primarily capture global semantics, while higher scales focus on fine-grained details. Employing a shared architecture across scales induces optimization conflicts. Moreover, due to the causal autoregressive process, inaccurate semantics at early scales can propagate and significantly degrade the final output. To address these issues, we introduce a scale-aware token-routed Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture, allowing scale-adaptive expert selection, thereby facilitating decoupled representation learning across scales. In addition, we enhance semantic modeling at early scales by incorporating external self-supervised features. Unlike naive alignment, we analyse and design a residual feature aggregation scheme tailored to the VAR paradigm. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly improves both training efficiency and generation quality. On the ImageNet 256*256 benchmark, our model achieves a superior FID compared to the dense baseline while requiring only half of the default training epochs and a smaller parameter budget, with a merely marginal increase in training cost. Moreover, the performance gap further widens with larger training epochs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种尺度感知的令牌路由混合专家（MoE）架构，并引入外部自监督特征残差聚合方案，用于改进视觉自回归模型（VAR）在多尺度表示学习中的优化冲突和错误传播问题，在ImageNet 256×256上以更少训练轮次和参数实现了更优的FID。
AI.motivation: VAR模型存在多尺度表示学习缺陷：低尺度捕获全局语义、高尺度关注细粒度细节，共享架构导致优化冲突；且因果自回归过程下早期尺度的不准确语义会传播并严重降低最终输出质量。
AI.method: 1) 引入尺度感知的令牌路由混合专家（MoE）架构，实现跨尺度的解耦表示学习；2) 融入外部自监督特征增强早期尺度的语义建模，设计了针对VAR范式的残差特征聚合方案。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256×256上，相比密集基线模型取得更优FID，仅需一半默认训练轮次和更小参数量，训练成本增幅极小，且随着训练轮次增加性能差距进一步扩大。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法显著提升了VAR的训练效率和生成质量，有效解决了多尺度表示学习中的优化冲突和错误传播问题。

title: Recovering Input Text from Hidden States: Study of Gradient-Based Inversion of Decoder-Only Language Models
summary: This work studies the hidden-state inversion problem: recovering the original input token sequence of a decoder-only language model from its last-layer hidden states. Rather than treating inversion as a one-shot reconstruction, we study it as a continuous embedding-space optimisation in which a soft proxy is driven towards the leaked target without any hard-token projection during the search, and a token is committed only once, at the end of the inner loop. This design choice has two consequences which are the main focus of this paper. First, keeping the optimisation entirely in continuous space exposes a rich set of internal signals: rank trajectories of the ground-truth token, per-position loss curves, and a discrete loss measured at commit time. Second, the discrete loss allows assessing the correctness of recovery via cumulative discrete loss. We further analyse which tokens break the reconstructions and find a sharp categorical asymmetry: space-prefixed, high-frequency function words in dense regions of the embedding matrix dominate the failures, while content-bearing tokens are recovered almost perfectly. On 10-token C4 prompts the exact-match rate rises from 66.9% to 97.5% (mean similarity 0.994) as the candidate window is widened, confirming that most errors are recoverable near-misses rather than genuine ambiguities. A comparison with the released SIPIT reference situates these findings: per-step hard projection is faster, but the continuous formulation is what makes the optimisation observable and its failures detectable. The results show that last-layer hidden states of GPT-2 are as sensitive as the original text.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了解码器-only语言模型的隐状态反演问题，通过连续嵌入空间优化从最后一层隐藏状态恢复原始输入token序列，发现连续优化可暴露丰富内部信号，且内容词恢复近乎完美，而高频功能词主导失败，在10-token C4提示上精确匹配率从66.9%提升至97.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有token反演方法多为一次性重构或硬投影方式，缺乏对优化过程的可观测性，无法有效检测和诊断恢复失败的原因。
AI.method: 将隐状态反演建模为连续嵌入空间优化问题，使用软代理（soft proxy）在连续空间中搜索，仅在内部循环结束时提交硬token，利用离散损失评估恢复正确性，并分析失败token的类别分布。
AI.result: 在10-token C4提示上，精确匹配率从66.9%提升至97.5%（平均相似度0.994）；发现空间前缀的高频功能词主导失败，内容词恢复近乎完美。
AI.conclusion: 连续优化公式使反演过程可观测且失败可检测；GPT-2最后一层隐状态对原文的敏感性极高，多数错误为可恢复的接近命中而非真正歧义。

title: Ghost in the Kernel: In-Context Learning with Efficient Transformers via Domain Generalization
summary: Transformer-based large models have demonstrated remarkable generalization abilities across different tasks by leveraging a context-aware attention module for in-context learning. With richer context, transformers adapt more effectively to the current use case without any parameter updates. However, the quadratic computational and memory complexity with respect to context length significantly slows data processing in softmax transformers. Linear transformers were proposed to address this issue by reducing the complexity to linear dependence on context length, but the design and understanding of the feature mapping in linear attention, from a theoretical viewpoint, remain unclear. In this paper, we investigate the approximation and generalization abilities of linear transformers under a two-staged sampling process from domain generalization. We show that linear transformers perform in-context learning as learning a mapping from context distributions to response functions. A dimension-independent convergence rate is obtained for our generalization analysis, which also exhibits the tradeoff between the regularities of data distributions and latent features. Guided by our theoretical framework, we propose a new perspective on activation and loss design for linearizing pretrained softmax large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上研究了线性Transformer在上下文学习中的近似和泛化能力，提出了一种新的视角来设计线性化预训练softmax大语言模型的激活函数和损失函数。
AI.motivation: Softmax Transformer在处理长上下文时计算和内存复杂度呈二次增长，而线性Transformer虽然降低了复杂度，但其特征映射的理论理解仍不清楚。
AI.method: 采用两阶段采样的域泛化框架，分析了线性Transformer的近似和泛化能力，证明了其上下文学习等价于从上下文分布到响应函数的映射学习，并得到了维度无关的收敛率。
AI.result: 获得了维度无关的收敛率，揭示了数据分布规律性与潜在特征之间的权衡；提出了线性化预训练softmax LLM的激活函数和损失设计新视角。
AI.conclusion: 线性Transformer在理论上具备有效的上下文学习能力，且设计良好的激活和损失函数可以将其应用于线性化预训练的大语言模型。

title: Learning to Compose: Revisiting Proxy Task Design for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) retrieves a target image from a reference image and a textual modification. While supervised CIR relies on costly triplets, Zero-Shot CIR (ZS-CIR) alleviates this reliance through proxy tasks trained on image-text pairs. However, existing proxy tasks primarily enhance visual and textual representations to accommodate a predefined composition mechanism such as pseudo-word injection into a frozen text encoder or linear feature arithmetic. As a result, the composition function itself remains unlearned, limiting the model's ability to express diverse and fine-grained semantic modifications. To address this, we propose FoCo, which models composition as two coordinated stages: focusing on modification-relevant visual content, and then completing the target semantics. We realize these through two proxy tasks: text-anchored visual aggregation to selectively gather visual content guided by localized textual semantics, and context-conditioned semantic completion to transform these aggregated visuals with the remaining scene context into a coherent composed representation. The tasks are trained jointly with a cross-instance contrastive objective, encouraging semantic diversity and discouraging shortcut composition strategies. Extensive experiments on four ZS-CIR benchmarks show FoCo's state-of-the-art performance and improved generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoCo，通过两个代理任务（文本锚定的视觉聚合和上下文条件语义补全）联合训练，在不依赖昂贵三元组的情况下实现零样本组合图像检索，在四个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本组合图像检索方法仅增强视觉和文本表示，但组合函数本身未被学习，限制了模型表达细粒度语义修改的能力。
AI.method: 提出FoCo，将组合建模为两个协调阶段：1) 文本锚定的视觉聚合，选择性收集与修改相关的视觉内容；2) 上下文条件语义补全，将聚合的视觉内容与剩余场景上下文转换为连贯的组合表示。两个任务通过跨实例对比目标联合训练。
AI.result: 在四个零样本CIR基准上达到最先进性能，展示了更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式学习组合函数而非仅调整表示，FoCo能更好地表达多样化和细粒度的语义修改，在零样本组合图像检索中表现优异。

title: CAT: Confidence-Adaptive Thinking for Efficient Reasoning of Large Reasoning Models
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable success on complex tasks by leveraging long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories, yet they frequently exhibit overthinking on simple queries, resulting in significant token overhead and reduced inference efficiency. However, existing compression methods predominantly apply uniform length reduction or rely on coarse-grained difficulty estimation, often leading to performance degradation on difficult problems. To address this limitation, we propose Confidence-Adaptive Thinking (CAT), a framework that incorporates the model's intrinsic self-certainty signals as confidence into the preference optimization process, which autonomously modulates reasoning lengths based on problem difficulty. Experimental results show that CAT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on reasoning accuracy across multiple benchmarks on different base models. Our work enables LRMs to effectively compress confident responses while deliberating on uncertain ones, offering a potentially robust solution for balancing accuracy and latency in practical industrial scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出Confidence-Adaptive Thinking (CAT)框架，通过引入模型自置信度信号进行偏好优化，让大推理模型根据问题难度自主调节推理长度，在保持准确率的同时压缩简单问题的推理开销。
AI.motivation: 现有LRMs在简单问题上存在"过度思考"（overthinking）现象，导致大量token浪费和推理效率下降；而现有压缩方法要么统一缩减长度，要么依赖粗粒度的难度估计，难以兼顾简单问题的效率和困难问题的性能。
AI.method: 提出CAT框架，将模型内在的自置信度信号作为置信度指标融入偏好优化过程，使模型能够根据问题难度自主调节推理长度。
AI.result: CAT在多个基准测试和不同基座模型上，推理准确率持续优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CAT能够在保持对不确定问题充分推理的同时压缩高置信度回答的长度，为工业场景中平衡准确率和延迟提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: PAPA: Online Personalized Active Preference Alignment
summary: Diffusion models are highly effective at modeling complex data distributions, including images and text. However, in applications like personalized recommender systems, the objective often shifts to modeling specific regions of the distribution that maximize user preferences-initially unknown but gradually uncovered through interactive feedback. This can naturally be framed as a reinforcement learning problem, where the goal is to fine-tune a diffusion model to maximize a reward function based on preferences. However, the main challenge lies in learning a parameterized reward model, which typically requires large-scale preference data-something that is often not feasible in practice. In this work, we introduce Personalized Active Preference Alignment PAPA, a novel method that bypasses the requirement for a parametrized reward model by directly optimizing the diffusion model using real-time user feedback. PAPA enables feedback-efficient preference alignment, drawing inspiration from the variational inference framework. We demonstrate PAPA's effectiveness through extensive experiments and ablation studies across diverse class-conditioned and fine-grained alignment tasks. Additionally, based on theoretical insights, we propose an enhanced fine-tuning strategy, referred to as EPAPA, that requires less computational budget and accelerates the fine-tuning process, further boosting PAPA's suitability for real-world deployment. Our code is made publicly available at https://github.com/NasikNafi/papa.

AI.tldr: 提出PAPA方法，无需参数化奖励模型，通过实时用户反馈直接优化扩散模型，实现个性化偏好对齐，并进一步提出EPAPA加速微调。
AI.motivation: 在个性化推荐等场景中，扩散模型需要根据用户偏好进行微调，但学习参数化奖励模型需要大量偏好数据，实际中难以获取。
AI.method: 提出PAPA方法，绕过参数化奖励模型，直接利用实时用户反馈优化扩散模型；基于变分推断框架实现反馈高效的偏好对齐；进一步提出EPAPA加速微调策略。
AI.result: 在多种类别条件和细粒度对齐任务上，通过大量实验和消融研究验证了PAPA的有效性，EPAPA在更少计算预算下加速了微调过程。
AI.conclusion: PAPA无需大规模偏好数据即可实现个性化偏好对齐，EPAPA进一步提升了实际部署的适用性。

title: LIST3R: Long-sequence Instance-aware 3D Reconstruction
summary: We present LIST3R, an instance-aware framework for long-sequence 3D reconstruction inspired by the way humans organize spatial memory around stable and recognizable objects. LIST3R organizes long-sequence reconstruction around instance anchors, using them to reconnect fragmented subsequences and consolidate local observations into a coherent global 3D scene. Given a long video, our approach partitions it into overlapping subsequences and builds a structured local instance library for each partial reconstruction, maintaining persistent trackable anchors with semantic and geometric evidence. These anchors are matched across subsequences to recover revisited regions and provide object-aware constraints for fragment alignment, producing a consistent global reconstruction. During this process, the evolving geometric evidence updates the local instance libraries and progressively organizes them into a unified global 3D instance library. Experiments on long-sequence benchmarks show that our method produces more accurate trajectories and higher-quality 3D reconstructions, highlighting the effectiveness of persistent instance anchors for organizing long-horizon 3D reconstruction. Our code is available on the project page: https://yixn965.github.io/LIST3R/.

AI.tldr: LIST3R是一个基于实例锚点的长序列3D重建框架，通过将长视频分割为重叠子序列并构建结构化实例库，利用跨子序列的实例锚点匹配实现全局一致的3D重建。
AI.motivation: 长序列3D重建中，随着序列增长，累积误差和片段对齐问题日益严重，现有方法缺乏有效的长期空间记忆机制来组织多片段重建。
AI.method: 将长视频分割为重叠子序列，为每个部分重建构建带有语义和几何证据的结构化局部实例库，通过跨子序列匹配实例锚点来恢复重复访问区域并提供目标感知约束，逐步将局部实例库整合为全局3D实例库。
AI.result: 在长序列基准测试上，LIST3R生成了更精确的轨迹和更高质量的3D重建结果，证明了持久实例锚点在组织长时序3D重建中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于实例锚点的框架能有效组织长序列3D重建，模拟人类空间记忆组织方式，在长时序场景中优于现有方法。

title: Dynamic Bidirectional Pattern Memory: A Production-Scale Empirical Characterisation of Inference-Time Gating in Clinical NLP
summary: We study inference-time pattern-memory gating in a production-scale clinical natural language processing (NLP) pipeline. The pipeline pairs a generator (Llama-3.3 70B) proposing extractions with a verifier (MMed-Llama-3.1 70B) accepting or rejecting them, over 167,034 PMC-Patients narratives, and adds a lightweight memory that learns at deployment which extractions to filter, so the verifier need not re-examine candidates already seen to fail. We report four findings. First, learning filtering rules directly from the verifier's rejections failed at full scale: the relation-extraction filter stayed empty despite 785,797 logged rejections, because they were spread too thinly across too many distinct forms to accumulate. Second, a simpler rule using a fixed clinical ontology produced the same filtering without the verifier, capturing 49,734 ontology-violating relations on a held-out 5,000-patient set. Third, of five versions of the question-answering filter, four failed for distinct, instructive reasons; the fifth succeeded by checking whether a patient's extracted entities support the question asked, and where it applies was 1.84 times likelier to flag an answer the verifier would reject than one it would accept. Fourth, one pattern held across all five: a filter is selective only when it tests the same evidence the verifier weighs, not when it imitates the verifier's output. Together these give a transferable result for any generator-verifier pipeline: the most natural memory design can fail silently at scale, and whether a pre-generation gate is selective is decided before any engineering effort, by whether its signal probes the question the verifier itself answers. Throughout, the system flags suspect extractions rather than deleting them, so every decision stays visible for clinical review. All code and test artefacts are released openly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究生产级临床NLP流水线中的推理时模式记忆门控机制，发现从验证器拒绝中直接学习过滤规则在大规模下失败，而基于固定临床本体的规则有效，且过滤器选择性的关键在于是否检测验证器所依赖的相同证据。
AI.motivation: 在生成器-验证器双模型流水线中，验证器需要反复检查已见过的失败候选，造成计算浪费。作者希望设计一种轻量级记忆机制，在部署时学习哪些提取结果应该被过滤，从而减少验证器不必要的重复工作。
AI.method: 基于Llama-3.3 70B作为生成器、MMed-Llama-3.1 70B作为验证器，在167,034篇PMC-Patients叙事上运行。尝试多种过滤规则设计：从验证器拒绝中学习规则、基于固定临床本体的规则、五种问答过滤变体。核心思想是轻量级记忆在部署时学习过滤模式。
AI.result: 1) 从验证器拒绝中学习规则在大规模下失败（关系提取过滤器为空）。2) 基于固定临床本体的规则捕获49,734个违反本体的关系。3) 五种问答过滤器中四种失败，一种成功（检查患者提取实体是否支持问题），成功者标记验证器将拒绝答案的可能性是接受答案的1.84倍。4) 关键发现：过滤器只有在测试与验证器相同的证据时才具有选择性。
AI.conclusion: 生成器-验证器流水线中最自然的记忆设计可能在大规模下无声失败；过滤器选择性在工程实施之前就已决定，取决于其信号是否探测验证器本身回答的问题。

title: Prototype Language Models
summary: Knowing which training examples drive outputs is fundamental to auditing, correcting, and understanding language models, yet for modern LLMs this remains expensive, approximate, and largely post-hoc. Standard language models generate tokens through a dense network pathway, causing training data's influence to be distributed across parameters rather than organized along explicit, traceable components. We introduce a prototype language model architecture, Prototypes for Interpretable Sequence Modeling (PRISM), that forms each prediction via a sparse, non-negative mixture of learned prototypes, trained with clustering objectives that anchor each prototype to coherent neighborhoods of training examples. Across architectures from 130M to 1.6B parameters trained on up to 50B tokens, prototype language models either surpass or remain within 2.5 percentage points on average downstream accuracy of matched dense baselines. We show that sparse prototype structure localizes curvature in the loss landscape, yielding a more tractable Hessian and enabling training data attribution that is ~500x faster than post hoc baselines when consuming equivalent memory. Calibrating linear prototype controllers can improve downstream accuracy by roughly 3 points while tracing those corrections back to training neighborhoods, and targeted prototype suppression can remove model behaviors without finetuning or measurable loss in generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM架构，通过稀疏非负原型混合进行语言建模，实现快速、可追溯的训练数据归因，且在130M-1.6B参数规模上性能接近或超越传统密集模型。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型的训练数据影响分布在整个参数空间中，难以追溯和审计，缺乏可解释的组件化结构。
AI.method: 提出PRISM原型语言模型架构，通过稀疏非负混合原型进行预测，结合聚类目标将每个原型锚定到连贯的训练样本邻域。
AI.result: 在130M至1.6B参数、最高50B token训练下，原型模型平均下游准确率超越或仅比密集基线低2.5个百分点；训练数据归因速度比事后方法快约500倍；通过校准线性原型控制器可提升约3个百分点的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 原型结构使损失景观的曲率局部化，得到更易处理的Hessian矩阵，支持高效的训练数据归因和模型行为修正。

title: Radial Interaction Tomography: Recognizing Non-Transitive Evolutionary Games from One Range-Expansion Image
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures. Ancillary files include computational diagnostics, benchmark code, and supplementary proofs
summary: Colored sectors in a microbial range expansion encode more than lineage survival counts. We formulate a computer-vision inverse problem: from one endpoint image of an accretive multi-type expansion, recover the radius-indexed pairwise boundary-flow field and test whether the visual pattern is compatible with a transitive scalar fitness hierarchy. The observable is a geometric signal extracted from sector-boundary curves in log-polar coordinates. We prove endpoint observability and stability for frozen fronts, weighted transitive/cyclic decomposition, contact-complete circular design, physical-clock and mechanism non-identifiability, exact Gaussian cyclicity testing, and Bonferroni-valid interval scanning. The benchmark is deterministic: analytic endpoint images, blurred/noisy pixel round trips, scalar-null stress tests, public-image tracing, multi-resolution mechanistic endpoints, and a non-learning frozen-front simulator. The implementation recovers pairwise edge-flow histories from endpoint images, detects cyclic residuals in a mechanistic four-type expansion, and uses those residuals as forcing signals for a dimensionless active design-control layer covering reaction-diffusion control, phenotype-frontier optimization, protocol synthesis, Monte Carlo robustness, and a downstream population-state bridge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套计算机视觉逆问题方法，从微生物群体扩张的终点图像中恢复边界流动历史，并检验其是否与传递性适应度层级兼容，包括理论可观测性证明、循环性检测及主动设计控制层。
AI.motivation: 微生物群体扩张中有色扇区编码的信息远超谱系存活计数，需要从终点图像中恢复历史动态并检验适应度层级结构。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为计算机视觉逆问题，利用对数-极坐标提取扇区边界曲线的几何信号，提出可观测性、稳定性、传递性/循环性分解、接触完备圆形设计、高斯循环性检验及Bonferroni区间扫描等方法。
AI.result: 在确定性基准（解析终点图像、模糊/噪声往返测试、标量零假设检验、公开图像追踪、多分辨率机制性终点、非学习冻结前锋模拟器）上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实现从终点图像恢复边缘流动历史，检测四类型膨胀中的循环残差，并利用残差作为驱动力构建主动设计控制层，涵盖反应-扩散控制、表型前沿优化、协议合成、蒙特卡洛鲁棒性及群体状态桥接。

title: How Ethos and Pathos Appeals Resonate in Reader Interpretations of Social Media Messages
comment: The article has been accepted to the 27th Annual Meeting of the Special Interest Group on Discourse and Dialogue (SIGDIAL) that will be held in Atlanta, Georgia on August 2-5, 2026. The official version will appear in the conference proceedings
summary: Rhetorical strategies and their influence on audiences are often studied through social media posts and comments. However, this focus overlooks the universal audience, which is the majority of readers who remain silent and do not explicitly express how a message affects them. This study investigates how two classical modes of persuasion, ethos and pathos, resonate in the silent audience's interpretations of meaning. Using a dataset of social media sentences paired with human-written interpretations, we label both sources for ethos and pathos and assess whether these rhetorical appeals are preserved. Our analyses show that interpretations diverge from the original sentences in 30% of cases, with rhetorically charged content eliciting greater variability than neutral content. We further find that ethos and pathos in original sentences can predict audience attitudes toward the author, underscoring the subtle ways rhetoric shapes perception beyond visible engagement.

AI.tldr: 研究通过社交媒体句子和人工解读数据，发现30%的解读与原句存在差异，修辞内容比中性内容引发更多解读变异性，且原文中的诉诸人品和诉诸情感可预测受众对作者的态度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注社交媒体中显性互动（评论、点赞），忽视了沉默的“普世受众”如何解读修辞信息。
AI.method: 使用社交媒体句子与人工解读配对数据集，对原文和解读进行诉诸人品和诉诸情感标注，分析修辞策略在解读中的保留情况。
AI.result: 30%的解读与原句存在差异；修辞内容比中性内容引发更大解读变异性；原文中的诉诸人品和诉诸情感可预测受众对作者的态度。
AI.conclusion: 修辞策略以隐蔽方式影响沉默受众的认知，超越可见的互动行为。

title: From Structural Equation Modelling to Double Machine Learning: Robustness Analysis for Survey-Based Research
summary: Structural equation modelling (SEM) is widely used in survey-based business and information systems research to assess latent constructs and theory-driven structural relationships. However, SEM path significance is obtained within a particular model specification and may not show whether findings remain stable under alternative estimation frameworks. This study develops and demonstrates a staged robustness analysis framework that connects SEM, ordinary least squares (OLS) regression, and Double Machine Learning (DML). SEM is first used to refine the measurement structure and estimate the robustness-baseline SEM model, in which the full theory-specified structural path system is retained for downstream robustness analysis before final structural path evaluation. OLS regression is then applied to SEM-derived construct scores as a transparent regression benchmark. Finally, DML-style residualisation is used to examine whether each tested focal relationship remains stable after flexible machine-learning-based adjustment for observed controls. Learner-sensitivity checks compare Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, and Support Vector Machine learners, and selected reverse-direction diagnostics are used to examine directional sensitivity. The framework is demonstrated using a FinTech Digital Customer Intimacy survey model. The findings identify which relationships are stable across SEM, OLS, and DML-style checks, and which require more cautious interpretation. A reproducible Google Colab workbook and generated result files are publicly available, providing a reusable template that researchers and students can adapt to other survey-based latent-construct studies. The paper contributes a practical robustness workflow and interpretation guide for survey-based researchers seeking to complement SEM with conventional and machine-learning-based robustness checks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套结合结构方程模型（SEM）、普通最小二乘法（OLS）和双机器学习（DML）的分阶段稳健性分析框架，用于调查问卷研究中潜在构念的因果推断稳健性检验。
AI.motivation: SEM路径显著性依赖于特定模型设定，可能无法反映在不同估计框架下的结果稳定性，需要更系统的稳健性检查方法。
AI.method: 先使用SEM建立基准模型，再用OLS对SEM导出的构念分数进行回归作为透明基准，最后用DML进行残差化处理，并对比随机森林、梯度提升、支持向量机等学习者，同时进行反向方向诊断。
AI.result: 以金融科技数字客户亲密度调查模型为例，识别出哪些关系在SEM、OLS和DML检查中保持稳定，哪些需要更谨慎解释。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个可复现的稳健性工作流和解释指南，方便其他问卷研究者借鉴使用。

title: Vitality-Aware Compression for Efficient Image-to-Shape Diffusion Transformers
summary: We propose the first compression approach for image-to-shape Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) that substantially reduces model size while preserving geometric fidelity. Despite remarkable progress in 3D shape generation, large DiT-based models remain computationally prohibitive in resource-constrained settings. Furthermore, it is difficult to directly transfer existing diffusion model compression strategies developed for different domains to 3D generation, and prior 3D efficiency approaches focus primarily on inference speed rather than backbone compression. To address this limitation, we build a geometry-aware compression framework tailored to image-to-shape DiTs. Guided by the observation that 3D DiT layers exhibit non-uniform importance for geometry synthesis, we introduce a vitality-guided framework integrating structured pruning, adaptive quantization, and targeted fine-tuning. Our method achieves up to 66% model-size reduction across state-of-the-art image-to-3D models while maintaining synthesis fidelity comparable to full-sized counterparts. This highlights the potential of our framework as a plug-and-play solution for efficient 3D shape generation across diverse models.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对图像到3D形状扩散Transformer（DiT）的压缩方法，通过剪枝、量化和微调实现高达66%模型尺寸缩减，同时保持几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 大型DiT模型计算成本高，现有扩散模型压缩策略难以直接迁移到3D生成领域，且以往3D效率方法仅关注推理速度而非主干网络压缩。
AI.method: 提出几何感知压缩框架，基于3D DiT层对几何合成的重要性非均匀分布，引入生命力引导的结构化剪枝、自适应量化和目标微调。
AI.result: 在多个最先进图像到3D模型上实现高达66%模型尺寸缩减，且合成保真度与完整模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可作为即插即用解决方案，用于高效3D形状生成。

title: MultiSynt/MT: Trillion-Token Multi-Parallel Pre-Training Data Translated Across 36 Languages
summary: Open web-scale pre-training corpora remain concentrated in English, limiting multilingual LLM development. We introduce MultiSynt/MT, an open synthetic parallel corpus with approximately 4.8 trillion target-language tokens across 36 European languages, produced by translating 100 billion high-quality Nemotron-CC tokens with Tower+ and OPUS-MT/HPLT-MT systems. For many medium- and lower-resource European languages, this is the largest openly available pre-training resource. On a broad multilingual benchmark suite, reference LLMs trained on MultiSynt/MT reach the final score of HPLT 2.0, a native-data baseline, using roughly 72% fewer pre-training tokens, and outperform it by approximately 15% relative at a matched 100B-token training budget. Our analyses also identify evaluation blind spots: standard multiple-choice benchmarks miss translation-quality differences that a fluency-sensitive LLM-as-judge evaluation cleanly recovers on the trained LLMs (with no fluency deficit in MultiSynt itself), and Norwegian idiomatic and culturally grounded tasks remain better served by native data. We release the corpus, including row-aligned translations from multiple systems, to support controlled research on multilingual pre-training data and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了涵盖36种欧洲语言、约4.8万亿目标语言token的多语言合成平行语料库MultiSynt/MT，通过翻译100B高质量Nemotron-CC token生成。训练的语言模型在广泛多语言基准测试中，以比HPLT 2.0原生数据基线少约72%的预训练token达到同等分数，在匹配100B token训练预算时相对提升约15%。同时发现标准多项选择基准无法捕捉翻译质量差异，而流畅性敏感的LLM-as-judge评估能有效识别。
AI.motivation: 现有开放网络级预训练语料主要集中在英语，限制了多语言LLM的发展，需要构建大规模、高质量的多语言预训练资源。
AI.method: 使用Tower+和OPUS-MT/HPLT-MT系统，将100B高质量Nemotron-CC tokens翻译成36种欧洲语言，生成约4.8万亿目标语言token的合成平行语料库MultiSynt/MT。
AI.result: 在广泛多语言基准测试中，MultiSynt/MT训练的LLM以比HPLT 2.0少约72%的预训练token达到同等分数，在100B token训练预算下相对提升约15%。标准多项选择基准存在评估盲点，LLM-as-judge评估能更好捕捉翻译质量差异。
AI.conclusion: 合成平行语料库MultiSynt/MT能有效支持多语言LLM预训练，尤其对中低资源欧洲语言效果显著，但挪威语等具有文化特定性的任务仍需原生数据。该语料库已开源以支持可控的多语言预训练研究。

title: Active-GRPO: Adaptive Imitation and Self-Improving Reasoning for Molecular Optimization
summary: Scientific reasoning is an increasingly important capability of large language models, yet improving the robustness and efficiency of training such reasoning remains a key open challenge. We study this problem in instruction-based molecular optimization, where answer-only supervised fine-tuning (SFT) collapses multi-step reasoning and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) suffers from sparse feedback. Reference-guided Policy Optimization mitigates both by anchoring policy updates to dataset-provided references, but its effectiveness is tightly coupled to reference quality: weak or misaligned references impose a performance ceiling. To overcome this ceiling, we propose active reasoning, a paradigm in which the policy actively decides, on a per-instance basis, when to imitate a reference and when to reinforce its own discoveries, while continuously upgrading what it imitates. We instantiate this paradigm as Active Group Relative Policy Optimization (Active-GRPO), realized through two coupled mechanisms: active imitate-reinforce and active referencing. The former performs imitation learning when the reference still outperforms the policy's own candidates, and shifts to self-improvement via reinforcement learning once the policy has generated molecules that surpass the reference. The latter continuously upgrades the reference itself by replacing it with the best policy-generated candidate discovered so far, progressively raising the imitation target and ensuring that reference guidance remains informative-rather than restrictive-throughout training. Across TOMG-Bench MOLOPT, Active-GRPO improves average SRxSim from 0.0959 for GRPO and 0.1665 for RePO to 0.1773 under matched three-seed evaluation, with statistically significant gains on LogP, MR, and QED.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Active-GRPO方法，通过主动模仿-强化与主动参考更新机制，在分子优化中提升大语言模型科学推理的鲁棒性和效率，在TOMG-Bench MOLOPT上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中，仅答案监督的SFT会崩塌多步推理，RLVR存在稀疏反馈问题，而参考引导策略优化受限于参考质量。
AI.method: 提出主动推理范式Active-GRPO，包含两个机制：主动模仿-强化（参考优于策略时模仿，策略超越参考时强化）和主动参考更新（用策略生成的最佳分子替换参考，持续提升模仿目标）。
AI.result: 在TOMG-Bench MOLOPT上，Active-GRPO将平均SRxSim从GRPO的0.0959和RePO的0.1665提升至0.1773，在LogP、MR、QED上有统计显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Active-GRPO通过动态平衡模仿与强化学习，并持续升级参考，有效克服了参考质量天花板，提升了分子优化任务中的科学推理性能。

title: DriveVer: Lightweight Trajectory Evaluator as Test-Time Verifier for Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving models often encounter performance bottlenecks, as training-time scaling leads to high computational costs and diminishing marginal returns. Existing planners typically adopt a one-shot generation paradigm, lacking secondary validation and active correction mechanisms to detect and revise suboptimal or unsafe trajectories during inference. To address this issue, we propose DriveVer, a lightweight, plug-and-play Test-Time Verifier that leverages the test-time scaling paradigm to enable autonomous driving systems to validate and refine trajectories without costly and heavy training. We construct a dedicated trajectory dataset based on the NAVSIM benchmark through condition-driven clustering and balanced sampling according to ego-vehicle states and navigation commands. Employing a dual-head architecture, DriveVer efficiently fuses candidate trajectories with multi-view visual representations and ego-vehicle kinematic features to simultaneously predict a safety confidence score and an absolute geometric refinement vector. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that DriveVer significantly improves the performance of base planning models. Notably, as an extremely compact model with only 34M parameters, DriveVer introduces minimal computational overhead, achieving competitive results while maintaining real-time inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: DriveVer是一个轻量级、即插即用的测试时验证器，通过测试时缩放范式让自动驾驶系统在推理阶段验证和修正轨迹，无需昂贵训练。它在NAVSIM基准上显著提升基础规划模型性能，仅34M参数即可实现实时高效推理。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型存在性能瓶颈，训练时缩放导致高计算成本和边际收益递减，且现有规划器采用一次生成范式缺乏二次验证和主动修正机制。
AI.method: 构建基于NAVSIM基准的专用轨迹数据集（通过条件驱动聚类和平衡采样），采用双头架构融合候选轨迹、多视图视觉表征和车辆运动学特征，同时预测安全置信度分数和绝对几何修正向量。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准上显著提升基础规划模型性能，仅34M参数即可实现竞争性结果并保持实时推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 测试时缩放范式可有效提升自动驾驶规划性能，轻量化验证器是解决训练成本高和边际收益递减问题的可行方案。

title: Beyond Document Grounding: Span-Level Hallucination Detection over Code, Tool Output, and Documents
summary: Hallucination detection for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is usually evaluated on natural-language document evidence. However, grounded generation systems increasingly rely on structured inputs: source code, developer-tool output, markdown documents, tables, and repository metadata. We introduce a unified benchmark for span-level hallucination detection over code, tool output, structured documents, and existing natural-language RAG datasets. The benchmark is built by starting from grounded correct answers, injecting localized hallucinations with exact character labels, and validating the code test split with evidence-based review. Our fine-tuned Qwen3.5-2B detector reaches 0.689 span-F1 on the unified test set and 0.60 on the code-agent source, where it substantially outperforms LettuceDetect-large (0.17) and the strongest zero-shot LLM judges we evaluated (at most 0.22). The same model remains competitive on established natural-language benchmarks, with 81.8 RAGTruth example-F1 and 0.724 English PsiloQA IoU.

AI.tldr: 提出一个针对代码、工具输出、结构化文档等非自然语言输入的RAG幻觉检测统一基准，并训练了一个2B参数的检测器，在多种场景下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG幻觉检测主要针对自然语言文本，但实际应用中越来越多地涉及代码、工具输出、结构化文档等非自然语言输入，缺乏统一的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建统一基准：从正确的基于事实的回答出发，注入带有精确字符标签的局部幻觉，并经过人工验证。在该基准上微调Qwen3.5-2B模型作为检测器。
AI.result: 微调后的Qwen3.5-2B检测器在统一测试集上达到0.689 span-F1，在代码智能体场景中达到0.60，大幅超越LettuceDetect-large(0.17)和最强零样本LLM评判(0.22)，同时在自然语言基准上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了结构化/代码输入场景下RAG幻觉检测的空白，证明了小模型通过针对性微调可在该任务上超越大模型。

title: Flow-Map GRPO: Reinforcement Learning for Few-Step Flow-Map Generators via Anchored Stochastic Composition
summary: Few-step flow-map generators, such as consistency models and MeanFlow, accelerate sampling by directly learning long-range transport maps between noise and data. However, these models are typically deterministic, which makes them difficult to optimize with reinforcement learning (RL) post-training methods that require stochastic trajectories and well-defined likelihood ratios. Existing SDE-based stochasticization techniques are designed for velocity-based samplers with infinitesimal or finely discretized transitions, and therefore do not directly apply to long-range flow maps. In this work, we propose Flow-Map GRPO, an online RL post-training framework for deterministic few-step flow-map generators. The key component is Anchored Stochastic Flow Map Composition (ASFMC), a path-preserving stochasticization mechanism that introduces randomness through anchor-based conditional resampling while preserving the original marginal probability path of the deterministic flow map. We derive GRPO objectives for both single-time and two-time flow-map parameterizations. Experiments on few-step FLUX-based text-to-image generators, including MeanFlow and sCM, show that Flow-Map GRPO improves pretrained deterministic flow-map models across reward-based, perceptual, and task-level evaluation metrics. Our results demonstrate that deterministic few-step flow-map generators can be effectively aligned with RL post-training without modifying their original model parameterization or retraining them as native stochastic models.

AI.tldr: 提出Flow-Map GRPO框架，通过锚定随机流图组合（ASFMC）实现确定性少步流图生成器的RL后训练对齐，提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性少步流图生成器难以用RL进行后训练优化，因为RL需要随机轨迹和似然比，而现有随机化方法是为基于速度的采样器设计的，不适用于长程流图。
AI.method: 提出ASFMC（锚定随机流图组合）机制，通过基于锚点的条件重采样引入随机性，同时保持原始确定性流图的边际概率路径不变；并推导了单时间和双时间流图参数化的GRPO目标。
AI.result: 在基于FLUX的少步文本到图像生成器（MeanFlow和sCM）上，Flow-Map GRPO在奖励指标、感知指标和任务级评估指标上均优于预训练的确定性流图模型。
AI.conclusion: 确定性少步流图生成器可以通过Flow-Map GRPO有效进行RL后训练对齐，无需修改原始模型参数化或重新训练为原生随机模型。

title: The Illusion of High Utility in Safety Alignment of Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Safety alignment of text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models aims to suppress harmful generations while preserving utility on benign prompts. Recent methods often appear to deliver high safety with high utility, but this conclusion rests largely on coarse global utility metrics (e.g., FID, CLIPScore) that are insensitive to fine-grained semantic correctness, creating an illusion of high utility. We show that when utility is measured with structured evaluation, this illusion breaks: on TIFA (Text-to-Image Faithfulness evaluation with Question Answering), safety-aligned models suffer substantial drops in semantic fidelity, including failures in object counts, attributes, and relationships. To diagnose the source of this gap, we analyze the text-encoder prompt embedding space and uncover semantic collapse, a contraction of embedding spread coupled with distortion of inter-prompt similarity structure, which strongly correlates with structured utility loss. Guided by this insight, we propose StructureAware Geometric Regularization (SAGE), a safety alignment objective that explicitly preserves embedding spread and inter-prompt relational structure during adaptation. Our method restores structured utility (TIFA +5.0% over prior state-of-the-art) while maintaining strong safety performance and competitive coarse-grained utility scores. Our source code and trained models are available at https://adeelyousaf.github.io/SAGE_ECCV26_Project_Page/.

AI.tldr: 本文指出文本到图像扩散模型的安全对齐方法在粗粒度指标上表现良好，但在细粒度语义保真度上存在显著下降。作者发现这是由于文本编码器嵌入空间出现"语义坍缩"，并提出结构感知几何正则化（SAGE）方法来恢复结构化效用，同时保持强安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐方法依赖粗粒度的全局指标（如FID、CLIPScore）评估效用，忽略了对细粒度语义正确性的影响，导致对模型真实效用的高估。
AI.method: 提出结构感知几何正则化（SAGE），在安全对齐过程中显式保留文本编码器嵌入的扩散程度和跨提示相似性结构。
AI.result: 在TIFA指标上相比先前最优方法提升5.0%，同时保持强的安全性能和粗粒度效用分数。
AI.conclusion: 安全对齐方法需要关注细粒度语义保真度，所提出的SAGE方法能有效缓解语义坍缩问题，实现安全性与结构化效用之间的更好平衡。

title: Group-Equivariant Poincaré Convolutional Networks
summary: While recent advancements like the Poincaré ResNet have demonstrated the potential of learning visual representations directly in hyperbolic space, their optimisation remains hampered by the computationally intensive nature of Riemannian gradients and the strict boundaries of the manifold. Furthermore, standard hyperbolic networks treat spatial transformations of the same object as distinct hierarchical concepts, leading to redundant parameter usage and vanishing signals. We propose Equivariant Poincaré ResNets, combining hyperbolic geometry with discrete symmetry groups ($C_4$ and $D_4$). We identify critical roadblocks in applying Euclidean equivariance to hyperbolic space and propose geometrically safe tensor reshaping, left-regular permutations for hyperbolic group convolutions, and joint-orientation Poincaré Midpoint Batch normalisation. Empirically, embedding equivariance drastically reduces the optimisation space, accelerating convergence while accelerating convergence while respecting the boundary constraints of the Poincaré ball and preserving spatial-group equivariance.

AI.tldr: 提出等变庞加莱残差网络，将双曲几何与离散对称群结合，解决优化困难、边界约束和参数冗余问题。
AI.motivation: 标准双曲网络将同一物体的空间变换视为不同层级概念，导致参数冗余和信号消失；且黎曼梯度计算昂贵、流形边界约束严格。
AI.method: 结合双曲几何与C4/D4离散对称群，提出几何安全的张量重塑、左正则置换双曲群卷积、联合方向庞加莱中点批归一化。
AI.result: 嵌入等变性大幅减少优化空间、加速收敛，同时满足庞加莱球边界约束并保持空间群等变性。
AI.conclusion: 等变双曲网络能有效提升优化效率并解决双曲网络中的参数冗余与信号消失问题。

title: MedCAGD: Context-Aware Gated Decoder for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)
summary: Medical image segmentation relies on the ability of encoder-decoder architectures to translate rich feature representations into accurate pixel-level predictions under challenging conditions such as low contrast, structural ambiguity, and scale variability. While recent advances in large-scale pretraining and transformer-based encoders have substantially improved feature extraction, segmentation accuracy remains constrained by decoder design, particularly in terms of cross-scale alignment, contextual integration, and boundary preservation. In this work, we revisit medical image segmentation from a decoder-centric perspective and propose a context-aware gated decoder that systematically regulates feature fusion and contextual aggregation throughout the decoding process. The proposed decoder integrates lightweight multi-scale channel recalibration, gated skip fusion with spatial competition and a global context aggregation mechanism that injects encoder-wide information into intermediate decoding stages. This design enables effective translation of strong pretrained encoder representations into spatially consistent predictions. Extensive experiments across 11 medical image segmentation benchmarks validate the effectiveness and demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms strong baselines while remaining computationally practical. Code: https://github.com/saadwazir/MedCAGD

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种上下文感知门控解码器（MedCAGD），通过多尺度通道重校准、门控跳跃融合和全局上下文聚合，提升医学图像分割中解码器对特征的有效利用，在11个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割方法多关注编码器的改进，但解码器在跨尺度对齐、上下文整合和边界保持方面仍有限制，分割精度受解码器设计瓶颈制约。
AI.method: 提出上下文感知门控解码器，包括：轻量级多尺度通道重校准、带空间竞争的门控跳跃融合、全局上下文聚合机制，将编码器全局信息注入解码中间阶段。
AI.result: 在11个医学图像分割基准上，该方法一致超越强基线方法，同时保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 从解码器中心视角重新审视医学图像分割，证明精心设计的解码器能有效转化强预训练编码器表示，产生空间一致的分割预测。

title: Persona Non Grata: LLM Persona-Driven Generations in MCQA are Unstable in Distinct Dimensions
comment: 23 pages, 12 figures. Under review at ARR
summary: Persona-driven generations (PDGs) have seen prolific use in research and industry applications, where a large language model (LLM) takes on a 'persona' while completing some task. While persona expressed through free-form text (like dialogue) has substantial work investigating stability or consistency, relatively, persona expressed in non-text-heavy outputs (like in multiple-choice question answering, or MCQA) is often overlooked. We work to address this gap, seeking to understand the instability of LLM PDGs in MCQA tasks. We develop three metrics investigating the performance, outcome, and question correctness stability, evaluating three distinct dimensions. Using these metrics, we find that instability varies consistently between model families and model size, and across question domains, with math/commonsense questions leading to greater instability. We also find task prompt format introduces more prediction instability than other hyperparameters, like temperature. Finally, we find that instability is related to task accuracy, and using our instability metrics, find different experimental settings that result in different best and worst personas for tasks, despite their similarity. This reveals the importance of checking hyperparameter instability in PDGs.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了当大语言模型（LLM）在多项选择题（MCQA）任务中扮演特定角色时，其输出存在的不稳定问题。作者开发了三个评估指标来量化性能、结果和问题正确性的稳定性，并发现不稳定程度受模型家族、模型大小、问题领域以及任务提示格式的影响，且与任务准确率相关。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注自由文本对话中角色扮演的一致性，但忽视了非文本密集型输出（如MCQA）中角色扮演的不稳定性，因此需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出了三个稳定性指标：性能稳定性、结果稳定性和问题正确性稳定性，用于评估LLM在MCQA任务中角色扮演的稳定性。通过实验分析模型家族、模型大小、问题领域、超参数（如温度）和任务提示格式等因素对稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 1）不稳定程度因模型家族、模型大小而异；2）数学/常识类问题导致更大的不稳定性；3）任务提示格式比温度等其他超参数引入更多预测不稳定；4）不稳定性与任务准确率相关，不同实验设置下最佳和最差角色不同。
AI.conclusion: 角色驱动的生成在MCQA任务中存在显著的不稳定性，检查超参数不稳定性对于角色驱动生成至关重要。

title: Decision-focused Sparse Tangent Portfolio Optimization
summary: Sparse tangent portfolio optimization aims to learn an interpretable, low-cardinality portfolio in the tangency direction of the mean-variance frontier. However, the associated cardinality-constrained formulation is NP-hard, and standard predict-then-optimize pipelines often misalign forecasting accuracy with downstream portfolio quality. We propose an end-to-end decision-focused learning framework that reformulates Sharpe ratio maximization as a Disciplined Parametrized Programming (DPP)-compliant convex programming layer and replaces discrete selection with a smooth top-$k$ operator enforcing an exact cardinality $k$. This enables gradient flow through prediction, asset selection, and re-optimization, allowing the predictive model to directly optimize portfolio performance. Across four major equity markets, our method achieves competitive and often superior out-of-sample Sharpe ratios compared with historical and prediction-focused baselines, with particularly strong gains in larger asset universes. Our \href{https://github.com/feuerwerksh/Diffble-card-SR}{code} is publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出端到端决策聚焦学习框架，通过可微凸规划层和平滑top-k算子实现稀疏切线投资组合优化，在四大股票市场取得优于传统方法的夏普比率。
AI.motivation: 解决稀疏切线投资组合优化中基数约束NP-hard问题，以及传统预测-优化流程中预测精度与投资组合质量不匹配的问题。
AI.method: 将夏普比率最大化重构为DPP兼容的凸规划层，用平滑top-k算子替代离散选择实现精确基数k约束，使梯度可流经预测、资产选择和再优化全过程。
AI.result: 在四大股票市场上，该方法相比历史基线和预测聚焦基线取得了有竞争力且通常更优的样本外夏普比率，在更大资产池中优势尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 端到端决策聚焦学习能有效提升稀疏投资组合的样本外表现，代码已开源。

title: MindAU: EEG-Conditioned Facial Action Unit Editing via Dual-Stream Manifold Alignment
summary: Recent brain decoding studies have made substantial progress in reconstructing externally perceived visual content from neural signals. However, using electroencephalography (EEG) recordings to guide facial expression editing remains largely unexplored and poses a distinct challenge: rather than recovering what a subject sees, it requires identifying facial-action related patterns from noisy EEG signals and grounding them in localized, identity-preserving expression edits. In this paper, we investigate EEG-conditioned facial image editing for fine-grained facial action unit (AU) control and propose MindAU, a unified framework for controlling facial AU edits from EEG signals. MindAU first learns noise-robust and AU-discriminative EEG representations through temporal masked reconstruction and AU classification supervision. It then bridges the modality gap via Dual-Stream Manifold Alignment, aligning EEG features with AU-level text semantics and identity-reduced visual displacement trajectories in the multimodal space of Qwen2.5-VL. Finally, MindAU incorporates EEG-aware Multimodal Rotary Positional Embeddings, landmark-guided reference masking, and AU-aware region supervision into a multimodal diffusion-based editor for high-fidelity identity-preserving editing. We also introduce E-CAFE, a curated benchmark for EEG-Conditioned Action-Unit Facial Editing with paired EEG-face editing samples and standardized evaluation protocols. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of MindAU and suggest its potential as a step towards future assistive expression technologies for individuals with facial neuromuscular disorders.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MindAU框架，利用EEG信号进行细粒度面部动作单元编辑，通过噪声鲁棒表示学习、跨模态对齐和多模态扩散编辑实现高保真身份保持的面部编辑，并构建了E-CAFE基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有脑解码研究主要聚焦于从神经信号重建视觉内容，但利用EEG信号指导面部表情编辑尚未被充分探索。其核心挑战在于从噪声EEG中识别与面部动作相关的模式，并将其映射到局部、保持身份的表情编辑中，尤其对于面部神经肌肉障碍患者的辅助表达技术具有重要意义。
AI.method: MindAU包含三个关键模块：(1)通过时间掩码重建和AU分类监督学习噪声鲁棒且AU判别性的EEG表示；(2)利用双流流形对齐将EEG特征与AU级文本语义和身份约简的视觉位移轨迹在Qwen2.5-VL多模态空间中对齐；(3)在基于多模态扩散的编辑器中，结合EEG感知的多模态旋转位置编码、地标引导参考掩蔽和AU感知区域监督，实现高保真身份保持编辑。
AI.result: 在E-CAFE基准数据集上的大量实验验证了MindAU的有效性，表明其在EEG条件下面部AU编辑任务中取得了优越性能。
AI.conclusion: MindAU为EEG引导的细粒度面部表情编辑提供了统一框架，展示了作为未来面部神经肌肉障碍患者辅助表达技术的潜力。

title: Quantifying the Affective Gap: A Zero-Shot Evaluation of LLMs on Fine-Grained Emotion Taxonomies
summary: Emotion recognition in natural language is a foundational challenge in affective computing, with critical implications for human-computer interaction, mental health support, and conversational AI. This paper presents a rigorous, unified zero-shot evaluation of three leading commercial large language models: Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6), ChatGPT (GPT-5.4), and Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash). The models were queried through their respective production APIs as of April 2026 on a fine-grained 13-class emotion classification task. Using a stratified 1,000-sentence sample from the boltuix/emotions dataset, which comprises 131,306 sentences across 13 categories, a single uniform prompt with no exemplars was applied identically across all models. Gemini achieves the highest accuracy (39.9%) and macro-F1 score (0.363), followed by GPT-5.4 (38.8%, macro-F1 = 0.291) and Claude (38.0%, macro-F1 = 0.159). All models excel on sarcasm and desire while consistently failing on love, confusion, and shame. McNemar tests reveal no statistically significant pairwise differences (p > 0.10), suggesting convergence at a shared zero-shot ceiling. Claude's markedly lower macro-F1 score exposes a class-imbalance prediction bias. These findings highlight the current limitations of frontier AI systems in zero-shot fine-grained emotion classification.

AI.tldr: 本文对三种商用大模型（Claude、GPT-5.4、Gemini）在零样本细粒度13类情感分类任务上进行评测，发现Gemini准确率最高（39.9%），所有模型在讽刺和渴望类表现好，在爱、困惑和羞愧类表现差，且模型间无显著统计差异，揭示了当前前沿AI在零样本情感分类上的局限性。
AI.motivation: 情感识别是人机交互、心理健康和对话AI的关键挑战，但目前缺乏对商用大模型在零样本细粒度情感分类任务上的统一评测。
AI.method: 使用统一的零样本提示（无示例），通过商业API对Claude、GPT-5.4、Gemini进行13类情感分类测试，使用boltuix/emotions数据集的1000句分层样本，采用McNemar检验进行统计显著性分析。
AI.result: Gemini准确率39.9%（宏F1=0.363），GPT-5.4准确率38.8%（宏F1=0.291），Claude准确率38.0%（宏F1=0.159）。所有模型在讽刺和渴望上表现优异，在爱、困惑和羞愧上表现差。McNemar检验显示无显著差异（p>0.10）。
AI.conclusion: 当前前沿AI系统在零样本细粒度情感分类任务上存在明显局限性，模型之间趋于收敛，且存在类别不平衡预测偏差。

title: Measuring Dead Directions: Decomposing and Classifying Singular Structure off Canonical Alignment
comment: 45 pages, 14 figures, 19 tables. Methods and empirical companion to arXiv:2606.05957 (Dead Directions: Geometric Singular Learning)
summary: We give a descent-free, alignment-free measurement of singular structure on trained networks. At a single frozen checkpoint the read recovers the order $k$ of each dead direction from the directional-Fisher rate, the master invariant from which the per-direction learning coefficient $1/(2k)$ follows exactly, in whatever basis the optimizer left. The same read classifies each direction, separating a genuine singularity, whose order the architecture fixes, from a flat gauge symmetry; the directional-Fisher magnitude settles the cases the order cannot. A pluggable detector supplies the directions for transformer, convolutional, and normalisation layers. The read recovers the architecture-predicted order across constructed cells and trained networks, including a fine-tuned vision transformer whose dead structure is the LayerNorm-kernel gauge and a from-scratch one whose compressed MLP forms a node-death at its activation order. Where the singular structure enumerates, the per-direction orders assemble, through the typed intersection of the loci, into the global coefficient $(λ, m)$ matching the closed form. The method removes the canonical-alignment and descent preconditions of the underlying rate result, turning order-recovery into a deterministic, architecture-general reading. We then map its reach into the Watanabe triple: the order determines the universal singular fluctuation $ν(k)$, though a trained network's realized $ν$ falls below it as the live structure absorbs the dead direction's data fluctuation, and the multiplicity recovers from the dominant structure under a single-locus assumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需对齐和梯度下降的奇异结构测量方法，能从冻结的网络检查点中直接恢复每个“死亡方向”的阶数k，并区分真实奇异性和平直规范对称性，适用于Transformer、卷积和归一化层。
AI.motivation: 现有奇异结构测量方法依赖于规范对齐和梯度下降前提条件，难以在训练好的网络上直接应用。本文旨在消除这些限制，提供一种确定性的、架构通用的奇异结构读取方法。
AI.method: 基于方向Fisher率（directional-Fisher rate）恢复每个死亡方向的阶数k，并提出主不变量的概念；通过方向Fisher大小区分阶数无法判定的情况；设计可插拔检测器为Transformer、卷积和归一化层提供方向。
AI.result: 该方法在构造单元和训练网络上均能恢复架构预测的阶数，包括微调ViT（LayerNorm核规范）和从头训练的ViT（MLP节点死亡）。全局系数(λ,m)可通过类型化交集的逐方向阶数组装得到，与封闭形式匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该方法消除了经典对齐和梯度下降前提条件，将阶数恢复变为确定性、架构通用的过程。同时映射到Watanabe三元组：阶数决定通用奇异涨落ν(k)，但训练网络的实现ν低于理论值，而重数可从单点位假设下的主导结构恢复。

title: DroneIQA-VLE: Multi-Task Drone Image Quality Assessment via Vision-Language Ensemble
comment: The model achieves 2nd place in ICME 2026 Drone-IQA Grand Challenge on Target-aware Image Quality Assessment for Low-altitude UAV Images
summary: We present DroneIQA-VLE, our solution to the ICME 2026 Drone-IQA Grand Challenge on Target-aware Image Quality Assessment for Low-altitude UAV Images. The framework jointly predicts global, target, and background quality scores by ensembling two complementary pipelines: (1) SigLIP2 vision encoders with multi-task regression heads, and (2) a LoRA-adapted Qwen3.5-9B multimodal large language model for quality score regression. The final global quality prediction is obtained by arithmetically averaging the outputs of both pipelines. Our method achieves 2nd place in the challenge, demonstrating its effectiveness. The code is available at https://github.com/sunwei925/DroneIQA-VLE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DroneIQA-VLE方法，融合SigLIP2视觉编码器与多任务回归头，以及LoRA微调的Qwen3.5-9B多模态大模型，通过两条互补管线集成预测无人机图像质量，在ICME 2026 Drone-IQA挑战赛中获得第二名。
AI.motivation: 针对低空无人机图像中目标感知的图像质量评估任务，现有方法难以同时捕捉全局、目标和背景质量信息，需要更有效的多任务预测框架。
AI.method: 构建两套互补管线：(1) SigLIP2视觉编码器+多任务回归头，分别预测全局、目标和背景质量分数；(2) LoRA适配的Qwen3.5-9B多模态大模型进行质量分数回归。最终将两条管线的全局质量预测结果取算术平均作为最终输出。
AI.result: 在ICME 2026 Drone-IQA Grand Challenge中取得第二名，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 融合传统视觉编码器与多模态大模型的集成方法能有效提升无人机图像质量评估性能，验证了多管线互补策略的有效性。

title: Svarna: An Open Corpus Workbench for Modern Greek
summary: This paper introduces Svarna, a free, open-source, web-based corpus workbench for modern Greek. Svarna integrates five databases covering various registers, institutional, literary, dialectal, social media, and historical, to provide a total of more than 507 million words and around 29 million sentences. This platform addresses the chronic gaps in Greek language technology. Although various corpus resources exist, they are scattered across different platforms, and in many cases, institutional access is restricted or they are no longer available online. Svarna integrates these resources into a single interface that can be used without logging in, installation, or specialized training. This system provides a concordancer with KWIC marking capabilities, frequency analysis including register-by-register normalization, collocation extraction using mutual information, a dictionary of 93 Greek discourse markers providing distribution profiles, text-level analysis tools including n-grams, variants, and collocation networks, register comparison using log-ratio, regular expression search, and an optional LLM layer for pragmatic annotation and free research mode. This platform is built upon SQLite FTS5 full-text indexes provided via a FastAPI backend, deployed as Docker containers on Azure, and released under the MIT license. Source code, build scripts, and deployment configurations are publicly available on GitHub. Users can add their own corpora and deploy their own instances. This document describes the system design, corpus structure, and use cases demonstrating the various queries supported by the platform. Svarna serves as the first step in exploring available data and is expected to lay the foundation for more comprehensive research in the future.

AI.tldr: Svarna 是一个免费、开源、基于网页的现代希腊语语料库工作台，集成了5个数据库（超过5.07亿词、约2900万句），提供 KWIC 索引、频率分析、搭配提取、话语标记词典、文本分析、语域比较、正则搜索及可选的 LLM 层，基于 SQLite FTS5 + FastAPI + Docker 部署，MIT 许可开源。
AI.motivation: 现代希腊语的语料资源分散在不同平台，许多需要机构访问权限或已不可用，存在长期的技术空白。
AI.method: 构建一个统一界面的语料库工作台，集成5个不同语域的数据库，提供词频、搭配、话语标记、文本分析、语域对比等功能，并可选集成 LLM 进行语用标注。
AI.result: 成功构建了 Svarna 平台，整合了超过5.07亿词和约2900万句的希腊语语料，支持多种查询和分析功能。
AI.conclusion: Svarna 是探索现代希腊语可用数据的第一步，为未来更全面的研究奠定基础。

title: Loss Smoothing for Stable Adaptation Under Distribution Shift
summary: In settings such as fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, neural networks are often adapted under distribution shift. Standard adaptation methods typically optimize the target objective directly, inducing an abrupt change from the source training objective. This abrupt transition can distort learned representations, including features that may still be useful for the new task. We investigate whether a more gradual transition can improve adaptation. We propose loss smoothing, a simple approach that interpolates between the source and target training objectives at the start of adaptation. This smooth transition helps to preserve useful features from the source distribution while still enabling the model to specialize to the target distribution. Across controlled supervised shifts, pretrained vision adaptation, offline-to-online and online reinforcement learning, and language model fine-tuning, we find that loss smoothing consistently improves performance, suggesting that smoother objective transitions are a broadly useful tool for model adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出损失平滑（loss smoothing）方法，通过在目标训练初期插值源和目标训练目标，实现更平滑的过渡，从而在分布偏移下的模型适应中保持有用特征，提升性能。
AI.motivation: 标准适应方法（如微调、强化学习）直接优化目标目标，导致从源训练目标突然转变，可能扭曲仍有用的学习表示。作者探究更渐进过渡是否能改善适应效果。
AI.method: 提出损失平滑方法，在适应初期对源训练目标和目标训练目标进行插值，实现平滑过渡。
AI.result: 在受控监督偏移、预训练视觉适应、离线到在线及在线强化学习、语言模型微调等场景中，损失平滑一致性地提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 更平滑的目标过渡是模型适应中广泛适用的有效工具。

title: EO-VGGT: Orbital Ray-Conditioned 3D Foundation Models for Satellite Multi-View Reconstruction
comment: This article is submitted to journal and under review
summary: In the era of satellite constellations, multi-view optical satellite imagery is pivotal for Earth Observation (EO) and high-quality Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction. Although feed-forward 3D foundation models have transformed computer vision, their deployment in satellite remote sensing is inherently constrained by the structural discrepancy between implicit perspective assumptions and explicit orbital pushbroom geometry. This geometric incongruity is further compounded by pronounced view-set heterogeneity.
